hero.badge: Two Proven Case Studies • Two Years of Data
hero.title: The Traditional Asphalt Model
hero.titleLine2: Here's the Proof It Can Be Fixed.
hero.subtitle: See how SmartSourcing USA helped a residential paving contractor and a commercial asphalt company transform their estimating operations—with real numbers, real results, and real savings.

whyAsphalt.title: Why Asphalt.
whyAsphalt.paragraph1: We're not trying to be everything to everyone. In 2026, SmartSourcing USA is laser-focused on asphalt companies—and here's why.
whyAsphalt.paragraph2Bold1: two full years of production data
whyAsphalt.paragraph2Middle: from both residential and commercial asphalt operations. That's not a pilot program. That's not a theory. That's a
whyAsphalt.paragraph2AfterBold2: with real numbers proving it works—across different markets, different project types, and different company sizes.
whyAsphalt.paragraph3Bold: fundamentally change the way asphalt companies estimate projects.
whyAsphalt.paragraph3AfterBold: The traditional model—where estimators double as project managers, waste hours on data entry, and rush bids at the end of the day—has been the industry default for decades. Our data proves there's a better way. A way that produces more bids, at higher accuracy, for a fraction of the cost.
whyAsphalt.paragraph4BeforeBold: In 2024, we deployed a remote estimator into a commercial asphalt operation and watched her outperform three U.S.-based estimators combined. In 2025, we embedded a remote team into a high-volume residential paving company and helped them support over 7,400 projects while reducing their field team.
whyAsphalt.paragraph4Bold: Two years. Two markets. One proven model.

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: These are the top challenges crushing asphalt companies right now.

items.title: Labor Shortages
items.description: 92% of firms can't find qualified workers. 41% of the asphalt workforce retires by 2031.

items.title: Razor-Thin Margins
items.description: 3-6% profit margins with rising material, labor, and equipment costs.

items.title: Wasted Estimator Time
items.description: Estimators spending 25%+ of their day on data entry and office tasks instead of estimating.

items.title: Estimating Errors
items.description: Rushed bids cost mid-sized contractors $80K-$150K per year in overruns.

items.title: Blended PM/Estimator Roles
items.description: The dual-role model looks cheaper on paper but breaks down in practice.

howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: From first conversation to full integration in 90 days or less.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We learn your current process, pain points, and goals. No sales pitch—just an honest assessment of whether remote support fits your operation.

steps.title: Custom Talent Match
steps.description: We recruit, vet, and present candidates with construction backgrounds—licensed civil engineers trained on your tools, specs, and market.

steps.title: Onboarding & Shadow Mode
steps.description: Days 1-30: Daily interaction, training on your systems, shadowing your current estimator. Your team stays in full control.

steps.title: Ramp & Refine
steps.description: Days 31-60: Increasing autonomy with spot-check oversight. 2-3x per week feedback sessions. Quality auditing by your lead estimator.

steps.title: Full Autonomy
steps.description: Days 61-90: Fully autonomous estimating with mandatory twice-weekly coordination. Your remote team member is now producing at full speed.

steps.title: Optimize & Scale
steps.description: We continuously monitor performance, provide off-season training at no cost, and scale your team as your business grows.

financialCase.title: The
financialCase.subtitle: What owners want to see before making the decision.

cards.title: 50-60% Cost Savings
cards.description: Remote estimator: $40K-$48K/yr total vs. $108K-$142K for in-house (salary + benefits + office).

cards.title: 2-3x Bid Capacity
cards.description: Go from 3-5 estimates/week to 8-12. More bids = more wins = $200K-$500K additional revenue.

cards.title: 60-90 Day Payback
cards.description: Most contractors see positive ROI within the first quarter through increased capacity and accuracy.

cards.title: 15-25% Accuracy Improvement
cards.description: Dedicated estimators catch more scope, reducing $80K-$150K in annual overrun costs.

cards.title: Zero Risk to Start
cards.description: 90-day pilot with month-by-month cancellation. Replacement guarantee if performance doesn't meet expectations.

items.question: "Won't my current estimator feel like I'm replacing him?"
items.answer: It's not about replacement—it's about amplification. Your current estimator becomes the trainer and auditor. Days 1-30 involve daily interactions; by Day 61-90 the remote estimator works autonomously with twice-weekly coordination. And the bonus pool math works in everyone's favor: $50K divided among 8 instead of 10 = a 25% raise for your local team.

items.question: "My season is only 8-9 months. Will they still be available next year?"
items.answer: Yes. Our contracts include off-season training at no additional cost to you. From Dec 1 to Feb 15, SmartSourcing covers their salary while providing additional training based on your feedback—specs, classes, and skill development—so they return stronger next season.

items.question: "How do I know they're actually working?"
items.answer: Working for a U.S.-based client remotely is a privilege that supports their family. If they don't perform, finding equivalent local work is extremely difficult. Beyond motivation, you'll see their output daily—bids produced, data entered, schedules created. The work speaks for itself.

items.question: "Is my bid data secure?"
items.answer: Every remote estimator works through your secure systems, on locked devices, over encrypted VPN with multi-factor authentication, under strict NDAs and role-based access. They never store files locally. If you have a dedicated IT department, we'll follow your existing security policies exactly.

items.question: "What if it doesn't work out?"
items.answer: We start with a 60-90 day pilot. If the fit isn't right, we provide a replacement estimator at no additional cost within 2 weeks. You're never stuck. Month-by-month cancellation is always available.

items.question: "How much of my time does onboarding require?"
items.answer: Month 1: 3-4 hours/week. Month 2: 1-2 hours/week. Month 3+: 30-60 minutes per month. We handle recruiting, vetting, technical training, and systems setup. You're reviewing live work and saying "more of this, less of that."

cta.title: Ready to Fix Your
cta.description: Two asphalt companies trusted us. Both transformed their operations in one season. Two years of data prove the model works. Your company could be next.
cta.footnote: Or schedule a free 20-minute discovery call to discuss your specific challenges.
